name: lidarr
title: Lidarr
description: Manage your Lidarr music library, search and add artists, monitor downloads, and review activity.
author: kendaniels

commands.name: index
commands.title: Artist Library
commands.subtitle: Lidarr
commands.description: Browse your artist collection with filtering

commands.name: search-artist
commands.title: Search Artist
commands.subtitle: Lidarr
commands.description: Search and add artists to your Lidarr library

commands.name: download-queue
commands.title: Download Queue
commands.subtitle: Lidarr
commands.description: Monitor active downloads and manage the queue

commands.name: instance-status
commands.title: Instance Status
commands.subtitle: Lidarr
commands.description: View connection status, system health, and quick actions for your Lidarr instance

preferences.name: host
preferences.title: Host
preferences.description: Lidarr host or full URL (e.g. 192.168.2.141 or http://192.168.2.141:8686)

preferences.name: port
preferences.title: Port
preferences.description: Lidarr port (ignored if port is already included in Host)

preferences.name: base
preferences.title: URL Base (Optional)
preferences.description: Optional Lidarr URL base path (e.g. lidarr if your URL is /lidarr)

preferences.name: http
preferences.title: Connection Type
preferences.description: Change the connection type for the Lidarr server

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: The API key of the Lidarr server
